course.name: Claude Code for Builders
course.tagline: Build your lean canvas, financial model, and pitch using AI as a thinking partner.

levels.name: Setup
levels.description: Build your FOUNDER.md and orient to the course

modules.title: Setup
modules.description: Build your FOUNDER.md and orient to the course

levels.name: Fundamentals
levels.description: Core Claude Code mechanics, applied to your real business

modules.title: First Session
modules.description: Experience Claude working on your real business for the first time

modules.title: Visualizing Your Business
modules.description: Set up VS Code or Obsidian as a visual workspace alongside the terminal

modules.title: Reading the Room
modules.description: Synthesize customer discovery interviews into a structured insights document

modules.title: Three Voices
modules.description: Run your lean canvas through the Investor, Customer, and Competitor agents simultaneously

modules.title: Building Your Team
modules.description: Create a custom AI agent tuned to your specific business and industry

modules.title: Permanent Memory
modules.description: Update FOUNDER.md with everything learned so Claude always knows where you are

levels.name: Advanced Founder Work
levels.description: The core Sprint 1 deliverables — built with AI

modules.title: The Lean Canvas
modules.description: Build your complete lean canvas section by section, with agent review

modules.title: The Numbers
modules.description: Build your 90-day financial model with AI as co-pilot

modules.title: The Pitch
modules.description: Draft and refine your 5-minute Founder Showcase pitch

agents.name: investor
agents.role: Business model stress-tester. Asks what a real investor asks.

agents.name: customer
agents.role: End user advocate. Speaks from the perspective of your target customer.

agents.name: competitor
agents.role: Competitive red-team. Maps the landscape and finds your gaps.

deliverables.description: These five files are the Sprint 1 deliverables. Produced with AI, owned by the founder.
